scribunto-desc: Qaab hismeed lagu dhex geliyo luqadaha scripting-ka bogagga MediaWiki.
scribunto-console-intro:
* Dhoofinta module-ka waxa laga heli karaa sida variable-ka "p", oo ay ku jiraan isbeddellada aan la kaydin.
* Ku billow xariiq calaamadda "=" si aad u qiimeyso sida expression ama u isticmaal print(). Isticmaal mw.logObject() si aad u aragto tables.
* Isticmaal mw.log() iyo mw.logObject() gudaha koodka module-ka si aad farriimo ugu dirto console-kan.
scribunto-console-too-large: Kulanka console-kan waa mid aad u weyn. Fadlan nadiifi taariikhda console-ka ama yaree cabbirka module-ka.
scribunto-console-cleared: Xaaladda console-ka waa la nadiifiyay sababtoo ah module-ka ayaa la cusboonaysiiyay.
scribunto-console-cleared-session-lost: Xaaladda console-ka waa la nadiifiyay sababtoo ah xogta kalfadhiga waa luntay.
scribunto-common-error-category-desc: Waxaa dhacay khalad markii la farsameynayay modules-ka ku jira bogga.
scribunto-common-nosuchmodule: Khalad script: Ma jiro module la yiraahdo "$2".
scribunto-common-nofunction: Khalad script: Waa inaad qeexdaa function la wacayo.
scribunto-common-timeout: Wakhtiga loo qoondeeyay in la socodsiiyo scripts-ka waa dhammaaday.
scribunto-common-oom: Qadarka xusuusta ee loo oggol yahay socodsiinta scripts-ka waa la dhaafay.
scribunto-lua-notarrayreturn: Khalad script: Module-ku wuxuu soo celiyay qiime $2 ah. Waxaa laga rabaa inuu soo celiyo table dhoofin.
scribunto-luastandalone-proc-error: Khalad Lua: Lama abuuri karo hab socod.
scribunto-luastandalone-proc-error-msg: Khalad Lua: Lama abuuri karo hab socod: $2.
scribunto-luastandalone-proc-error-proc-: Khalad Lua: Lama abuuri karo hab-socod: proc_open lama heli karo. Hubi dejinta PHP ee "disable_functions".
scribunto-luastandalone-decode-error: Khalad Lua: Khalad gudaha ah: Lama awoodin in la fasiro fariinta.
scribunto-luastandalone-write-error: Khalad Lua: Khalad gudaha ah: Lama qori karin tuubada.
scribunto-luastandalone-read-error: Khalad Lua: Khalad gudaha ah: Lama akhrin karin tuubada.
scribunto-luastandalone-gone: Khalad Lua: Khalad gudaha ah: turjumaad-hayaha hore ayuu uga baxay.
scribunto-luastandalone-signal: Khalad Lua: Khalad gudaha ah: turjumaad-hayaha wuxuu ku dhammaaday signal "$2".
scribunto-luastandalone-exited: Khalad Lua: Khalad gudaha ah: turjumaad-hayaha wuxuu ka baxay xaalad $2.
namespaceinfo-description-ns828: Meel magac loogu talagalay modules-ka Lua, kuwaas oo laga wici karo bogagga wiki, iyo bogaggooda dukumentiga
namespaceinfo-description-ns829: Bogagga wadahadalka ee modules-ka iyo dukumentigooda
